creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
(In reply to Eugene Kilimchuk from comment #53)
Very cool work!  For telegraf, is there a way to tell ahead of time if the box "ready" to panic after a restart ? I have a couple of machines running with INVARIANTS for about 3 days now.  I loaded up telegraf to spawn a number of ping processes as well as external scripts.  Or better to just wait a week or so ?
